intro: Pachystemon trilobus, also known as Chinese bugbane or trilobed bugbane, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Ranunculaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, due to its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The bioactive constituents of Pachystemon trilobus include alkaloids, glycosides, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal effects.
